Precondition: Both end effectors are free; cup_1 and cup_2 are accessible on top of the box.
Postcondition: Left end effector grasps cup_1; right end effector grasps cup_2.

Precondition: Left end effector grasps cup_1; right end effector grasps cup_2; table top is available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 and cup_2 are placed on the table; both end effectors are free; box top is unblocked.

Precondition: Both end effectors are free; box left and right sides are accessible; box top is unblocked.
Postcondition: Box is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on its left and right sides.
